privileged_info_summary: The book_meeting task requires an agent to access Odoo 17 ERP running at http://localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials, navigate to Emma Thompson's contact page (a pre-created contact with email emma.thompson@northbridge.org and job position Product Manager), and create a new calendar.event meeting. The meeting must be titled 'Career Coaching Session - Emma Thompson', scheduled for next Wednesday at 3:00 PM (15:00), lasting 1 hour, with Emma Thompson as an attendee. The database is named odoo_scheduling with calendar and contacts modules initialized. PostgreSQL 15 backend. All contact and event data is synthetic, created during environment setup via setup_data.py which instantiates 12 realistic contacts and 15 calendar events using Odoo's XML-RPC API.
